scripts.check: bun run check:type && bun run check:biome
scripts.check:type: bun run check:type:root && bun run check:type:packages
scripts.check:type:packages: bunx tsc -p pkgs/rssbook/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p pkgs/utils-feed-helper/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p platform/cloudflare/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p platform/deno/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p platform/netlify/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p platform/node/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p platform/vercel/tsconfig.json --noEmit
